title: AI Software Engineer, VP
company_focus: Major UK banking and financial services group
description:
Join us as a Software Engineer

- This is an opportunity for a technically minded individual
  to join us as a Software Engineer
- You’ll be designing, producing, testing and implementing
  working software, working across the lifecycle of the
  system
- Hone your existing software engineering skills and advance
  your career in this critical role
- We're offering this role at vice president level

What you'll do

Working in a permanent feature team, you’ll be developing
knowledge of aspects of the associated platform across the
disciplines of business, applications, data and
infrastructure. You’ll also be liaising with principal
engineers, architects in the domain and other key
stakeholders to understand how the platform works and how it
supports business objectives.

You’ll also be:

- Applying Agile methods to the development of software on the
  backlog
- Producing resilient and long-lived software and acting
  flexibly to cope with future needs
- Delivering intentional architecture and formulating emergent
  design through innovative ideas, experimentation and
  prototyping
- Designing and developing software with a focus on the
  automation of build, test and deployment activities, using
  executable patterns

The skills you'll need

We’re looking for someone with at least 12 years of strong
full stack experience in software design and implementation,
including being able to exploit programming languages to
solve complex problems. You’ll also need to be capable of
complex requirements analysis capture and validation against
and with business and systems requirements.

Additionally, you’ll demonstrate:

- Experience in Python with Machine Learning frameworks such
  as NumPy, Pandas, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Transformers
- Hands-on experience with Large Language Models such as
  OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, Llama
- Expertise in Machine Learning or Deep Learning algorithms &
  NLP, including deep learning architectures and vector
  embeddings
- Sound collaboration skills with the ability to work with
  business teams to produce pragmatic solutions that work
  for the business
- Strong stakeholder management skills and communication
  skills with the ability to communicate complex technical
  concepts in a simple way

Hours

45

Job Posting Closing Date:

28/04/2026
responsibilities: Design, produce, test and implement working software across the full system lifecycle within a permanent feature team
Develop knowledge of the associated platform across business, applications, data and infrastructure disciplines
Apply Agile methods to software development on the backlog, producing resilient and long-lived software
Deliver intentional architecture and formulate emergent design through innovative ideas, experimentation and prototyping
Design and develop software with a focus on automation of build, test and deployment activities
Liaise with principal engineers, architects and key stakeholders to align platform capabilities with business objectives
Build AI/ML-powered solutions leveraging LLMs and deep learning frameworks
use_cases: Building AI-powered software solutions for banking and financial services
Implementing LLM-based applications using OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic and Llama models
Developing NLP and deep learning solutions for business process automation
Creating intelligent systems using vector embeddings and ML algorithms
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role explicitly requires hands-on experience with LLMs
(OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, Llama), ML frameworks
(PyTorch, TensorFlow, Transformers), and deep learning
architectures including NLP and vector embeddings. The
software engineer will be designing, building, and
implementing systems that directly leverage these AI/ML
technologies.
